lines: Hannah braces a patched kettle between her boots while Thomas circles the fire.
"If this is another arrival question, ask it before the water boils away."

choices.label: Leave the family to its fire

lines: "They gave us Fire Seven and one blanket. The chalk mark is for intake, but we arrived after the water roll closed."
"They say tomorrow as if children drink calendars."

choices.label: Ask what drove them from the farm
Leave the family to its fire

lines: "A pear farm east of the flooded cut. The trees flowered after the soil went black, so we stopped trusting pretty things."
"Baruch carried the kettle while I carried Thomas. We left the rest for the roots."

choices.label: Leave the family to its fire
